_note: Live forecast record. Append-only: never edit a resolved entry's issued fields; log a new FCST- id instead. Set verification.repo_url and anchor_url once the public repo and OpenTimestamps proof exist.

verification.anchor_note: Each forecast is SHA-256 hashed at issue time. A public repo + weekly OpenTimestamps anchor of this file is pending setup; links appear here once live.

forecasts.statement: Pendle Principal Token collateral held in Aave V3 remains above $3B on 2026-12-31.
forecasts.resolution_criteria: Aave V3 risk analytics or a public Dune dashboard reports Pendle PT (sUSDe and successor PT) collateral in Aave V3 at or above $3,000,000,000 on 2026-12-31.
forecasts.base_rate: ~$4B mid-2026 per Research Log Week 03. Tests whether the recursive-leverage structure stays intact rather than unwinding.

forecasts.statement: Aggregate BTC+ETH perpetual funding stays at or below zero for at least 7 consecutive days at some point before 2026-12-31.
forecasts.resolution_criteria: Coinglass aggregated BTC+ETH perpetual funding (averaged) reads at or below 0% for 7 or more consecutive days within the window.
forecasts.base_rate: Occurred briefly March 2026; recurs in bear phases. This is the reflexivity trigger named in Week 03 — observed, not a cascade prediction.

forecasts.statement: Aave governance executes at least one reduction to the max LTV or supply cap of a Pendle PT-sUSDe collateral type before 2026-12-31.
forecasts.resolution_criteria: An executed Aave governance proposal (Snapshot vote plus on-chain execution) lowers the max LTV or supply cap of a Pendle PT-sUSDe collateral type within the window.
forecasts.base_rate: Aave risk teams iterate parameters routinely; rising PT concentration already flagged in their risk reviews. Tests whether the exposure is real enough to act on.

forecasts.statement: Pendle Finance TVL remains majority sUSDe/USDe-derived (>50%) on 2026-09-30.
forecasts.resolution_criteria: DefiLlama Pendle TVL breakdown shows more than 50% of Pendle TVL in sUSDe/USDe-linked PT/YT markets on 2026-09-30.
forecasts.base_rate: ~75% as of Week 03. Tests the single-yield-source concentration that makes the loop reflexive.
